description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a predominantly black exterior and angular, stealth-inspired design. The wings are sharply swept back and feature multiple hardpoints or attachments, giving it a militaristic or advanced urban patrol appearance. The fuselage is compact and streamlined, with a forward-placed, enclosed cockpit that appears to be single-seat, protected by a faceted canopy. The tail section is robust, with twin vertical stabilizers and a pronounced rear engine housing, suggesting high maneuverability. The landing gear is visible and appears to be a tricycle configuration with sturdy, fixed legs, suitable for rapid deployment on urban surfaces. The overall surface is glossy and hard, with metallic and composite materials dominating the structure.
description: A black, angular, stealth-style airplane with swept wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a forward, enclosed cockpit. Its glossy, hard surface and robust landing gear suggest a high-tech, urban-ready design.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the swept-back wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and the angular, faceted canopy at the front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, forward cockpit, and the fixed tricycle landing gear beneath the wings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin engine housings, vertical stabilizers, and the wide stance of the landing gear.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the angular nose, cockpit placement, and the detailed undercarriage structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and no visible winglets; wings are angular and integrated into the fuselage with a slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers in an H-tail configuration, with no horizontal stabilizer visible between them.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main gear units under the wings and a single nose gear, all fixed and exposed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single-seat configuration and a faceted canopy.
